$comment: GENERATED by contracts/codegen/generate.py from sidecar.schema.yaml - DO NOT EDIT.
description: On-card episode record written by discardd at capture (CONTRACT §2).

files.description: The clip file(s) the sidecar describes (the .insv/.mp4 extension flip is tolerated, §2.1).

back.description: The actual clip file the sidecar describes (the hard-required pointer, §2.1).

global_episode_seq.description: NAND swap-proof monotonic ordinal; the PRIMARY ordering spine (card is not a unit).

identity.description: Who/what/where/which-take. Resolved-as-of-recording precedence lives at ingest (§3.3).

bimanual_episode_id.description: Fob-injected shared L/R id; pairs the two wrist cams of ONE take with no order-join.

calibration_id.description: Optional reference to a calibration entity (scope none/fleet/per_camera; §3.1, C-11).

camera_id.description: Camera body identity (provenance; never decides the kit, §3.3).

display_id.description: DERIVED human handle <YYYYMMDD>_<operator>_<station>_<NNNNNN>; never a key (§7).

episode_id.description: UUIDv4 pairing/join key, minted by the fob, identical on both arms (§7). The ONLY join key.

episode_ordinal.description: The fob label ordinal (distinct from global_episode_seq; the label-join source).

kit_id.description: The kit (from the fob). HARD-non-empty — decides canonical naming + pairing.

operator_id.description: Operator/person handle (roster binding cross-checked at ingest).

prompt.description: Task prompt (v1-extra HARD — required when schema declares v1+, §2.2/OQ-4).

side.description: Camera side (from the camera NAND). HARD-non-empty — decides L/R pairing.

task_source.description: Where the task came from (v1-extra HARD; the task-precedence winner, §3.5).

outcome.description: Why the take ended + the operator/coordinator outcome flags (distinct from completeness).

archive.description: 0/1 — operator marked DESCARTAR (soft discard); ingest routes archive==1 to the archive bucket.

recording_suspect.description: 0/1 — NET-NEW; coordinator could not confirm the clip grew (the no-SD trap, §2.2).

provenance.description: The forensic capture-stack identity — how a consumer filters by the producing build (§2.2, B-9).

fob_id.description: The coordinator fob that triggered the take.

modality.description: Capture modality; the teleop-generality field (Eunomia today is always umi, §1.1/B-9).

record_format_version.description: Writer-owned monotonic int; forensic build-scoping by query. Warn so old cards validate (§5).

schema.description: Schema identifier; tells a parser which fields to expect (additive semver, §5).

seq.description: Per-card filename seq counter (numeric, §2.2). Distinct from the fob ordinal.

timing.description: Per-camera clip-derived start/stop + the fob-measured cross-cam skew. Numbers loose by design.

camera_clock.description: PROVENANCE-ONLY (the X3 has no RTC; its clock is POISON — never used for ordering, §2.2).

start_skew_ms.description: Fob-measured cross-cam start skew (the at-capture inter-arm-skew prior).

started_unix.description: Clip-derived start (discardd derives from the file).

title: Sidecar
